testcase.name: testFaction

cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists t_battle_log cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists t_building cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists t_city cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists t_city_war cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists t_cultivation cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists t_equipment cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists t_gacha_record cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists t_map_zone cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists t_material cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists t_mount cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists t_partner cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists t_player cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists t_player_map cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists t_resource cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists t_season cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists t_skill cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists t_team cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists t_treasure cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists t_user cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists t_war_credit cascade Hibernate: create table t_alliance ( level integer, member_count integer, create_time bigint, id bigint generated by default as identity, leader_id bigint, icon varchar(255), name varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table t_alliance_diplomacy ( alliance_id1 bigint, alliance_id2 bigint, id bigint generated by default as identity, update_time bigint, status varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table t_alliance_member ( alliance_id bigint, id bigint generated by default as identity, join_time bigint, player_id bigint, role varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table t_battle_log ( attack_loss integer, attack_power integer, defend_loss integer, defend_power integer, battle_time bigint, city_id bigint, enemy_id bigint, id bigint generated by default as identity, player_id bigint, battle_type varchar(255), log varchar(255), result varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table t_building ( level integer, city_id bigint, id bigint generated by default as identity, player_id bigint, update_time bigint, type varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table t_city ( barracks_level integer, gold_output integer, level integer, lingqi_output integer, market_level integer, morale integer, palace_level integer, warehouse_level integer, id bigint generated by default as identity, player_id bigint, name varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table t_city_war ( attacker_power integer, defender_power integer, reward_exp integer, reward_gold integer, attacker_id bigint, city_id bigint, defender_id bigint, id bigint generated by default as identity, war_time bigint, attacker_team varchar(255), defender_team varchar(255), result varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table t_cultivation ( exp integer, level integer, id bigint generated by default as identity, last_update bigint, player_id bigint, total_time bigint, type varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table t_equipment ( level integer, quality integer, id bigint generated by default as identity, player_id bigint, name varchar(255), special varchar(255), type varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table t_gacha_record ( is_guarantee boolean, partner_id integer, gacha_time timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, player_id bigint, gacha_type varchar(255), partner_name varchar(255), quality varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table t_map_zone ( gold_output integer, level_req integer, lingqi_output integer, x integer, y integer, zone_id integer, id bigint generated by default as identity, name varchar(255), relic_type varchar(255), type varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table t_material ( count integer, star integer, id bigint generated by default as identity, player_id bigint, icon varchar(255), name varchar(255), type varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table t_mount ( atk integer, def integer, equipped boolean, hp integer, mount_id integer, speed integer, star integer, id bigint generated by default as identity, player_id bigint, icon varchar(255), name varchar(255), quality varchar(255), skill varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table t_partner ( atk integer, exp integer, growth_atk integer, growth_int integer, growth_lead integer, growth_speed integer, intelligence integer, lead integer, level integer, max_level integer, max_troops integer, partner_id integer, selected boolean, speed integer, star integer, star_exp integer, id bigint generated by default as identity, player_id bigint, faction varchar(255), icon varchar(255), name varchar(255), quality varchar(255), skill1 varchar(255), skill2 varchar(255), type varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table t_player ( battle_count integer, chapter_id integer, exp integer, gacha_count integer, gold integer, level integer, lingqi integer, signin_days integer, zhanli integer, id bigint generated by default as identity, name varchar(255) not null, signin_last_date varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table t_player_map ( x integer, y integer, zone_id integer, enter_time bigint, id bigint generated by default as identity, player_id bigint, zone_type varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table t_resource ( food integer, gold integer, iron integer, wood integer, city_id bigint, id bigint generated by default as identity, player_id bigint, update_time bigint, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table t_season ( season_num integer, end_time bigint, id bigint generated by default as identity, start_time bigint, status varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table t_skill ( cooldown integer, cost integer, effect_value integer, skill_id integer, id bigint generated by default as identity, description varchar(255), effect_type varchar(255), icon varchar(255), name varchar(255), target_type varchar(255), type varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table t_team ( team_index integer, city_id bigint, create_time bigint, id bigint generated by default as identity, partner1id bigint, partner2id bigint, partner3id bigint, player_id bigint, update_time bigint, name varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table t_treasure ( treasure_id integer, id bigint generated by default as identity, player_id bigint, bonus varchar(255), icon varchar(255), name varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table t_user ( create_time timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, password varchar(255) not null, username varchar(255) not null unique, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table t_war_credit ( battles integer, credit integer, kills integer, alliance_id bigint, id bigint generated by default as identity, player_id bigint, season_id bigint, update_time bigint, primary key (id) ) 2026-03-16T12:38:30.814+08:00 INFO 646370 --- [fengshen-game] [ main] j.LocalContainerEntityManagerFactoryBean : Initialized JPA EntityManagerFactory for persistence unit 'default' 2026-03-16T12:38:32.057+08:00 WARN 646370 --- [fengshen-game] [ main]
